title: SaplingIvkDecryptor re-creates PreparedIncomingViewingKey per output, O(N) extra group muls
description: scanner.rs: try_decrypt_sapling calls PreparedIncomingViewingKey::new(&self.ivk) on every output. This involves a Jubjub scalar mul per call. It should be precomputed once at SaplingIvkDecryptor construction and stored as a field, reducing per-output overhead to only the decryption step.
